_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 3 prevalence tiers in allergens.json (high/moderate/low). UI-bound vocab — carries DISPLAY CONTRACT.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for allergen-prevalence display. Drives the prevalence chip on the allergen warning card.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/allergens.json `prevalence` field (17 entries; live: moderate=8, low=6, high=3).

allergen_prevalences.name: Common in supplements
allergen_prevalences.notes: This allergen appears in many supplements. If you have a sensitivity, always read the label and look for 'Contains' statements.

allergen_prevalences.name: Sometimes in supplements
allergen_prevalences.notes: This allergen appears in some supplement categories. Read the label if you have a known sensitivity.

allergen_prevalences.name: Rare in supplements
allergen_prevalences.notes: This allergen rarely appears in supplements but is included for completeness. Cross-contamination is the main concern.
